canonical_definition: A visualization technique applied to encoder weights to project high-dimensional vectors into 2D space, used to qualitatively assess clustering of features and interpretability of expert representations.
papers: Mixture of Experts Made Intrinsically Interpretable
Position: We Need An Algorithmic Understanding of Generative AI
